products.name: Rad-Compatible Replacement Battery 48V 14Ah
products.description: Drop-in 48V 14Ah (672Wh) second/replacement pack for external-battery Rad models; 13S5P, DC5 charge port, 30A BMS.

products.name: TorqArm V4 Rear Torque Arm
products.description: 1/4-inch stainless torque arm for rear hub motors; fits 12mm and 14mm axles. Cheap insurance against axle spinout on 750W+ hubs.

products.name: Thudbuster ST Suspension Seatpost
products.description: 50mm-travel elastomer suspension seatpost, E-Bike Ready, 330 lb rider rating; 27.2/30.9/31.6 diameters plus shims. Round alloy saddle rails only.

products.name: Active Suspension Seatpost LR Aluminum
products.description: Spring-based active suspension seatpost (Cirrus Cycles); swappable springs tune to rider weight, up to 250 lb. LR spring range.

products.name: Active Suspension Seatpost XR Aluminum
products.description: XR spring-range version of the Kinekt active suspension seatpost; same swappable-spring design, multiple colors.

products.name: ShockStop Suspension Stem
products.description: Elastomer suspension stem that takes the buzz out of the front end. Standard 1-1/8 inch steerer, 31.8mm bar clamp (25.4/26.0 shims), 80-120mm lengths.

products.name: Armour Tire Insert 26x4.0-4.8
products.description: Foam anti-flat insert for 26-inch fat tires (559x100-122). Per-wheel; runs even when punctured. The fat-bike flat killer.

products.name: Armour Tire Insert 20x3.0-4.0
products.description: Foam anti-flat insert for 20-inch fat/mid-fat tires (406x75-100). Covers 20x3.0, 20x3.3 and 20x4.0 stock rubber. Per wheel.

products.name: Armour Tire Insert 27.5x1.95-2.5
products.description: Foam anti-flat insert for 27.5-inch commuter tires (584x50-63). Per wheel; big deal for heavy hub-drive commuters.

products.name: Armour Tire Insert 20x1.95-2.5
products.description: Foam anti-flat insert for 20-inch street tires (406x50-63). Per wheel; fits compact cargo and lite folders.

products.name: Juggernaut 26x4 Fat Tire
products.description: The OEM RadRover fat tire with K-Shield puncture lining, 26x4.0, 5-30 PSI. Straight stock replacement, no guesswork.

products.name: Street Tire 20x3 (single)
products.description: Lectric's official 20x3.0 smooth street tire with reflective strip. Turns an XP into a quieter, faster pavement bike.

fitments.note: Vendor compatibility: 'Plug and play for 2019-2021 Rover models. (Up to Rover 5)'. Caution: NOT for Rovers with 500-lumen stock headlight ('THE 500 will burn up your controller'). https://area13ebikes.com/products/radkit
Vendor compatibility list: 'Mission (works; power adjustment recommended)'. https://area13ebikes.com/products/radkit
Vendor compatibility list names RadExpand 5 as working ('Rad 5Expand (works)'). https://area13ebikes.com/products/radkit
Vendor: 'Runner Plus - Tested and Working'; EXCEPT units with 500-lumen stock headlight (burns controller). https://area13ebikes.com/products/radkit
Vendor lists 'Runner Two' as customer-reported working, not vendor-tested. Confirm before sale. https://area13ebikes.com/products/radkit
Vendor: older Wagon models untested, 'potential fitting issues'; explicitly 'NOT compatible with new Radwagon 5'. Not compatible with RadRover 6 (ASI). https://area13ebikes.com/products/radkit

EggRider Rad variant: 'EggRider Rad compatible with the following models' incl. RadRover 1/2/3/4/5 (Lishui controller, 5-pin screw connector). Not compatible with KT-upgraded controllers. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/
EggRider Rad variant list incl. 'RadRunner 1/1 Plus/2'. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/

EggRider Rad variant list incl. 'RadExpand 5'. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/

EggRider Radv2 variant: 'EggRider Radv2 is compatible with the following models' incl. RadCity 5 Plus (ASI controller, 5-pin julet connector). Order the Radv2 hardware. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/
EggRider Radv2 variant list incl. RadRover 6 Plus (ASI, julet). Order the Radv2 hardware. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/
EggRider Radv2 variant list incl. RadRunner 3 Plus (ASI, julet). Order the Radv2 hardware. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/
EggRider supported-bikes documentation names the Ride1Up Roadster v2. https://manual.eggrider.com/compatibility/
FTH compatibility list names 'RadRunner 2'. 48V 14Ah, DC5 CHRG connector, external pack. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH compatibility list names 'RadRunner Plus'. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH compatibility list names 'RadWagon 4'. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH compatibility list names 'Rad Mission'. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH compatibility list names 'RadExpand 5' (and 'RadExpand 5 Plus'). https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14

FTH list names RadMini and RadCity 4 era packs but NOT RadRover 5 by name; RadRover 5 uses the same 48V external pack format. Confirm with FTH before sale. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14

FTH lists 'Rad Runner 3 Plus', but RadRunner 3 Plus ships with a semi-integrated battery, not the classic external pack; format-mismatch concern. Confirm pack style before sale. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH lists 'RadCity 5 Plus Step-Thru', but RadCity 5 Plus uses a semi-integrated pack; confirm compatibility and frame variant before sale. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH lists 'RadRover 6 Plus Step-Thru' only; 6 Plus uses a semi-integrated pack format. Confirm variant fit before sale. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
FTH lists 'RadSter Trail Regular', but Radster runs Rad's newer battery platform; treat as unconfirmed until FTH verifies. https://www.fthpower.com/products/copy-of-fth-rad-dc5-14
